query: Ukraine Russia direct in-person peace talks July 2026 scheduled date Istanbul next round
answer:
## Summary

**Bottom line:** As of July 13-14, 2026, **no date has been announced** for a next round of direct in-person Ukraine-Russia negotiations, and **there is no indication that a round is scheduled or has occurred between July 11 and July 24, 2026**. The process remains paused.

**Key findings:**
- **Turkey (July 13, 2026):** A Turkish government source told RIA Novosti that Ankara expects direct talks to resume in Istanbul "before the end of the summer" and continues diplomatic contacts with both sides — but **gave no specific date**.
- **Russia (June 23, 2026):** Putin said Russia is ready to resume talks on the Istanbul (2022) framework and "realities on the ground," but proposed no date. A **Financial Times report (~July 5, 2026)** indicates Russia is unlikely to engage in substantive talks **before February 2027**.
- **Ukraine (June 26, 2026):** Reportedly has **no plans** to resume negotiations on the Russian-proposed Istanbul framework; its diplomatic focus in early July was the US/NATO track (Zelensky-Trump contacts, NATO summit).
- **Trajectory:** Points toward continued delay, not an imminent round. The situation sits at the "expectation/hope" stage with active diplomatic contacts but no scheduled meeting, delegation announcement, or confirmed date.

*Caveat: AskNews real-time news tooling was unavailable during this research (subscription/billing error), so findings rely on web search and direct article fetches. Most recent authoritative data is dated July 13, 2026.*

Sources:
- [Turkey expects direct Russia-Ukraine talks to resume in Istanbul before end of summer (July 13, 2026)](https://turkey.news-pravda.com/en/russia/2026/07/13/94739.html)
- [Putin says Russia ready for peace talks based on Anchorage, Istanbul agreements (June 23, 2026)](https://www.aa.com.tr/en/eurasia/putin-says-russia-ready-for-peace-talks-with-ukraine-based-on-anchorage-istanbul-agreements/3975825)
- [Russia unlikely to resume meaningful Ukraine talks before 2027, FT reports (July 5, 2026)](https://www.pravda.com.ua/eng/news/2026/07/05/8042522/)
- [Ukraine has no plans to resume negotiations based on Istanbul agreements (June 26, 2026)](https://turkey.news-pravda.com/en/russia/2026/06/26/91243.html)
- [Lavrov views resumption of Istanbul peace talks positively](https://8am.media/eng/lavrov-views-peace-talks-istanbul-positively/)
- [Zelensky calls on NATO after Russia's latest attack (July 6, 2026)](https://time.com/article/2026/07/06/ukraine-russia-attack-zelensky-nato-summit-request-trump-putin/)
- [Peace negotiations in the Russo-Ukrainian war — Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peace_negotiations_in_the_Russo-Ukrainian_war_(2022%E2%80%93present))
